---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap. Ex: "It's hard to understand attention because..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Category

- [ ] New Learn chapter
- [ ] Visualization improvement
- [ ] Dataset expansion
- [ ] Training experiment
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
